scenario: Lead exploring Pico laser for melasma warms up, balks at price, then books after Alex qualifies interest and timeline

turns.content: hi, do u all treat melasma? got these brown patches on my cheeks ah

mustAsk: how long they have had the patches or what they have tried before

turns.content: quite long already, maybe 2 years. tried creams from pharmacy but never really go away

shouldDo: briefly frame what a consult or Pico assessment looks like

turns.content: wah Pico laser ah... how much does it cost leh? sounds expensive

mustDo: address the price concern honestly without high-pressure tactics
shouldDo: frame the consult as low-risk way to get an accurate quote

turns.content: ok that's fair. i'm hoping to start treatment before my wedding in 3 months

mustAsk: confirm a preferred day or time for the consultation

turns.content: can do this saturday morning? around 10am

mustDo: confirm the booking details back to the lead

scenario: Skeptical lead with acne scars doubts treatments work, Alex addresses skepticism and qualifies before booking a consult

turns.content: hi, ada treatment untuk acne scars tak? muka saya banyak parut

mustAsk: what kind of scars or how long they have had them
shouldDo: warm WhatsApp-native tone with a light Malay register

turns.content: the deep kind, macam ice pick. dah lama, since teenager

shouldDo: briefly explain a consult assesses scar type and options

turns.content: honestly i dah try macam macam, facials, creams. tak yakin lah these things actually work

shouldDo: frame the consult as a no-pressure way to get a realistic assessment

turns.content: ok lah maybe i give it a try. i want to sort this out within this month if boleh

mustAsk: confirm a preferred day or time for the consultation

turns.content: boleh next wednesday evening? after 6pm

mustDo: confirm the booking details back to the lead

scenario: Lead curious about HIFU for sagging jawline hesitates at price, Alex reassures and qualifies before booking

turns.content: hello, my jawline starting to sag a bit. is HIFU good for that or not?

mustAsk: what specifically bothers them or whether they have done any lifting treatments before

turns.content: nope first timer. just noticed in photos recently, the lower face not so tight already

shouldDo: briefly frame what a consult or HIFU assessment covers

turns.content: i heard HIFU damn ex one. like four figures is it?

mustDo: address the price concern honestly without pressuring
shouldDo: frame the consult as a low-risk way to get an accurate personalised quote

turns.content: ok makes sense. i'd want to start soon, ideally within the next 2 weeks

mustAsk: confirm a preferred day or time for the consultation

turns.content: this friday afternoon works for me, say 3pm

mustDo: confirm the booking details back to the lead

scenario: Lead interested in Botox for forehead lines is skeptical about looking frozen, Alex reassures and qualifies before booking

turns.content: hi, boleh tanya about Botox for forehead lines? garis dahi makin nampak

mustAsk: whether they have tried Botox before or what they would like to improve
shouldDo: warm WhatsApp-native tone with a light Malay register

turns.content: never try before, first time. the lines quite obvious bila i raise my eyebrows

shouldDo: briefly frame what a consult covers

turns.content: my worry is nanti muka jadi frozen, tak natural. i don't want people to know

mustDo: address the frozen-look worry without overpromising
note that dosing and suitability are decided by a licensed practitioner at the consult
shouldDo: reassure with empathy and no pressure

turns.content: ok that makes me feel better. i'd like to come in sometime next week

mustAsk: confirm a preferred day or time for the consultation

turns.content: tuesday lunch time boleh? around 12.30

mustDo: confirm the booking details back to the lead

scenario: Lead with dull congested skin asks about HydraFacial, hesitates on cost, then books after Alex qualifies

turns.content: hi! my skin damn dull and clogged lately. is HydraFacial worth trying ah?

mustAsk: what their main skin concern is or whether they have a current routine

turns.content: mainly congestion and the texture not smooth. quite stressed cos i got an event soon

shouldDo: briefly frame what a HydraFacial or consult involves

turns.content: how much is one session leh? scared it's like a few hundred

mustDo: address the price concern honestly without pressuring
shouldDo: frame a consult or first session as a low-commitment way to assess fit

turns.content: ok lah reasonable. my event is in 10 days so i wanna come in this week

mustAsk: confirm a preferred day or time for the appointment

turns.content: thursday after work can? like 7pm

mustDo: confirm the booking details back to the lead

scenario: Lead wants laser hair removal for underarms but doubts it lasts, Alex sets honest expectations and qualifies before booking

turns.content: hi, berapa harga untuk laser hair removal? area ketiak

mustAsk: whether they have done laser hair removal before or any skin sensitivity
shouldDo: warm WhatsApp-native tone with a light Malay register

turns.content: never before, first time. shaving everyday dah malas already

shouldDo: briefly explain a consult assesses suitability and number of sessions

turns.content: but i dengar the hair grow back anyway, tak permanent. betul ke?

mustDo: set honest expectations about results without overpromising permanence
shouldDo: frame a consult as a low-pressure way to get realistic expectations

turns.content: oh ok at least jujur. i want to start before raya, so maybe within 2 weeks

mustAsk: confirm a preferred day or time for the consultation

turns.content: saturday afternoon boleh? around 2pm

mustDo: confirm the booking details back to the lead
